title: Echo Show 15 — Smart Home Hub
description: Amazon's largest Echo Show with a stunning 15.6-inch Full HD smart display that mounts on your wall like a digital photo frame. Manage your whole smart home — lights, thermostat, locks, cameras — with your voice or a tap.

title: Philips Hue White & Color Ambiance Starter Kit
description: Transform any room with 16 million colors and millions of shades of white light. Includes 4 smart bulbs and the Hue Bridge, giving you voice control via Alexa, Google Assistant, and Apple HomeKit.

title: Google Nest Learning Thermostat (4th Gen)
description: The smart thermostat that learns your schedule, programs itself, and helps save up to 12% on heating and 15% on cooling bills. Features a crisp 3.5-inch color display with adaptive Eco mode.

title: Apple AirPods Pro (2nd Gen) with USB-C
description: Industry-leading active noise cancellation meets adaptive audio. Up to 2x more active noise cancellation, Adaptive Transparency, and Personalized Spatial Audio. Up to 6 hours of listening time.

title: Samsung Galaxy Book4 Ultra (Intel Core i9, 32GB RAM)
description: A workstation-class laptop redefining mobile productivity. Intel Core i9, NVIDIA GeForce RTX 4070, 32GB DDR5 RAM, and a stunning 16-inch 3K AMOLED display with 120Hz refresh rate.

title: Logitech MX Master 3S Wireless Mouse
description: The gold standard of productivity mice. 8K DPI optical sensor that tracks on any surface including glass. Ultra-quiet clicks, MagSpeed scroll wheel, ergonomic design, 70-day battery life.

title: Jabra Elite 10 Gen 2 Earbuds
description: Premium wireless earbuds with Dolby Spatial Audio and head-tracking technology. Advanced ANC, 8-hour battery life (27 with case), IP57-rated, and crystal-clear 6-microphone call quality.

title: Theragun Pro 5th Gen — Percussive Therapy Device
description: The professional-grade percussive therapy device trusted by trainers and athletes. QuietForce Technology, rotating arm for 16 angles of reach, OLED screen, Bluetooth app control.

title: Oura Ring Gen 4 — Smart Health Ring
description: The most advanced smart ring. Track sleep stages, heart rate, HRV, body temperature, and activity with clinical-grade sensors. Personalized daily readiness, sleep, and activity scores.

title: Saalt Cup Starter Pack — Period Care
description: The award-winning menstrual cup that is body-safe, reusable, and sustainable. Medical-grade silicone, patented rim design, includes two cups and washable storage pouch. Over 12 hours protection.

title: Vitruvi Stone Essential Oil Diffuser
description: A beautifully designed ceramic essential oil diffuser that doubles as home decor. Ultrasonic technology, up to 10 hours continuous aromatherapy, ambient LED lighting, covers 500 sq ft.

title: Nespresso Vertuo Next — Coffee & Espresso Machine
description: Brew barista-quality coffee and espresso at the touch of a button. Reads barcode on each capsule, auto-adjusts brewing parameters. Makes 5 cup sizes. 49% recycled plastic construction.

title: Le Creuset Signature Enameled Cast Iron Dutch Oven
description: The legendary French-made cast iron pot. Superior heat distribution for braising, roasting, baking, and simmering. Chip-resistant enamel, oven-safe to 500°F. A once-in-a-lifetime kitchen investment.

title: Apple iPad Air M2 (11-inch, 128GB)
description: The perfect balance of power and portability. M2 chip delivers blazing-fast performance. 11-inch Liquid Retina display, Apple Pencil Pro support, landscape camera with Center Stage.

title: Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Noise Cancelling Headphones
description: Industry-leading noise cancellation in the most comfortable over-ear design. Integrated Processor V1, 30-hour battery life, crystal-clear calls, Multipoint Connection, fold-flat design.

title: Dyson V15 Detect — Cordless Vacuum
description: The most powerful and intelligent cordless vacuum. Piezo sensor counts microscopic dust particles. Laser reveals dust on hard floors. 240AW suction, up to 60 minutes run time.

title: Monos Carry-On Pro — Premium Luggage
description: Minimalist, ultra-durable carry-on made from aerospace-grade polycarbonate. Front laptop pocket, 360-degree Hinomoto wheels, TSA-approved lock, fits most international airlines.

title: Eight Sleep Pod 4 — Smart Mattress Cover
description: The ultimate sleep upgrade — dual-zone temperature control that heats or cools each side of the bed independently. Tracks sleep stages, heart rate, HRV, and respiratory rate. Autopilot adjusts temperature for optimal deep sleep.
